# Visual Content Studio upload-size reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_visual_size_reference.py. Do not edit by hand. -->

The dashboard reads these same values directly from the registry.

| Template | Asset slot | Recommended | Ratio | Minimum | Maximum | Max file | Formats | Alpha | Safe area T/R/B/L | Fit |

Background recommendations match the final renderer canvas. Header recommendations match the exact header destination rectangle. Larger same-ratio images are normalized once during upload.

## Generic Asset Library uploads

Use template-specific guidance whenever the asset has a known destination. These values apply when uploading a reusable asset without selecting a template slot.

| Asset type | Recommended | Ratio | Minimum | Maximum | Max file | Formats | Alpha |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| Background | 1600x900 | varies | 320x180 | 4800x2700 | 10 MB | PNG, JPEG, WEBP | supported |
| Logo | 1024x1024 | 1:1 | 256x256 | 2048x2048 | 10 MB | PNG, WEBP | required |
| Watermark | 1200x300 | 4:1 | 600x150 | 2400x600 | 10 MB | PNG, WEBP | required |
| Overlay | 1600x900 | varies | 320x180 | 4800x2700 | 10 MB | PNG, WEBP | required |
| Header Graphic | 1104x208 | 69:13 | 552x104 | 3312x624 | 10 MB | PNG, JPEG, WEBP | supported |
| Texture | 1600x900 | varies | 320x180 | 4800x2700 | 10 MB | PNG, JPEG, WEBP | supported |
| Icon | 256x256 | 1:1 | 64x64 | 1024x1024 | 10 MB | PNG, WEBP | required |
| Avatar Frame | 512x512 | 1:1 | 256x256 | 1024x1024 | 10 MB | PNG, WEBP | required |
| Badge | 256x256 | 1:1 | 64x64 | 1024x1024 | 10 MB | PNG, WEBP | required |
| Event Banner | 1600x900 | varies | 320x180 | 4800x2700 | 10 MB | PNG, JPEG, WEBP | supported |
| Other | 1600x900 | varies | 320x180 | 4800x2700 | 10 MB | PNG, JPEG, WEBP | supported |
